name: Bitterbind Point

flavourText: Though we live and act as individuals,
in truth, we are tethered together.
The barriers that divide us need not be broken
for our spirits to become entangled.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.

flavourText: "I have a recurring nightmare... I run...
I scream... but only the dead hear me..."

flavourText: Hills of stark and jagged white it walks,
scratching your ribs without, within.
The Fiend has naught but Empty Eyes,
though sees you, it does, indeed.

flavourText: "Hate? You speak to me of hate? You have no idea what your persecution inflicts.
How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala

8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield

100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."
